segments.text: I was told that we have a very beautiful place for this puja.
Rama was amazed how everything is working out so beautifully
For all of you,
You are already lucky people i must say
Moreover This Place Was called as the Fort Of Flowers
And now it's called as The Fort Of Blood, Bloody Fort
But with All these flowers
It should become the fort of flowers again
It's a very, very beautiful place you have come to.
The vibrations are also very good here
I've been always wondering why Germany was called as Germany?
Germ means sprouting
any germ of anything
means the sprouting of it
germinate
means to sprout
The sprouting of Sahaja Yoga, as I told you many a times before once taken by Germans
will be reaching its epitome – it's highest point.
We have had lots up and downs doesn't matter
It is difficult place
And now we started really the germination in proper way
Yesterday I saw the whole sky was filled with color and light.
As you know that vibrations have light,
it's very light flickering –
a small light each particle of vibration has
And we can see them
but when there are too many
then they get caught up by your cameras
But yesterday I think the clouds got vibrated and it's a very great thing to get the clouds
vibrated.
If the cloud are vibrate, then rain will be vibrated . The rain is vibrated ,the
land would be vibrated all these crops that have to be germinated will be vibrated
too so when he goes into body of human beings they'll also get vibrations.
The best way now is to vibrate the clouds, I think if you have many more people for Sahaja Yoga.
That's an idea came into my mind last night that why not vibrate all the clouds?
Moreover vibrations are very tiny bit with one point going in a half circle normally
This half circle then combines to make Ohm sometimes,
Sometimes it makes a chain.
Sometimes It gathers together
To Make crosses
But the basic thing about them is that they can think
And Think very fast
Much faster than human beings can think
and They are extremely collective
Extremely Collective
So they move together, thinking the same way
understanding in an absolute manner
and work out whole thing
In a very beautiful silent
that you cannot even feel.
Now Kundalini rising as we have done
must be mystery for all of us
how can with your hands raise the kundalini
and you must be thinking that this must be some sort of a special power Mother has given us,
That we can put our hands to anybody's Kundalini. It rises
then stops at the place when there is problem
And again it rises
Now its nothing but mystery for You
You have got now, within you the power.
Like –you can move water
or matter
and all those things
Animals cannot do that
even if they can do little bit here-and there
They cannot transform it for their use
For example see this nice brass here
Nice silver there
There's a little Ganesha sitting there
All these have been transformed from something that is dead,
which animals cannot do.
As you become the master of living work
– now You are the masters
Of Living Work not of The Dead
so with a living force
and use it for Your own purpose
but most surprising thing
that you are not even aware of it,
That You're doing It.
Like when Your doing say a little elephant like
that your aware and know
that youre doing something great
And will tell oh I have made such
an such thing ,such nice place i've done
.You'll be conscious offit
because u have got ego
But When ur giving realization to people
ur not aware
Because U have no Ego
And what you say, Mother it's not coming up.
You see? It is just catching on Vishuddhi
–it' snot working out!
If start speaking in third person
and don't saying I can do or have done
its worked-out
Only when it works
your face says that I know its done
So...you are even aware of
You're not conscious
there no ego about
Don´t take any credit for
Just feel joyous
like so many people came for your workshop,
oh it was great Mother.
What is that you were doing all the job?
You are working out but don't feel that way
The reason why we work in a way called as Akarma
Akarma means when do something
and not feeling of doing anything
When you are not conscious of it, that is akarma.
when your doing something and
You think That Your Doing this work
This Work ,that thing then It Is a Karma
But now the karma has become an Akarma
Not that we're not doing anything
We'r e doing so many things
but u do NOT feel
That U Are doing IT because
You have now been doing Akharma
And all living work is Akarma
Like The Mother Earth She sprouts seeds
She is not aware of it.
In the same way, you people are raising
The Kundalini – You're Not Aware Of It!
And when You Are Not AwareofIt
,You don't even want to think how
Is happening? See Me a human being
Raising hand like this definitely
The kundalini rises I see
Comes out off head
It happens
i see
This fact
Then How
Is that this is happening
What's the process
what' s the procedure
How it has worked?
Did I make any mistakes?"
You never think like that.
did i do in a wrong manner, you don't think
such just to start raise the Kundalini
.You're just don' t bother
To find out have given myself abandoned or not
Have seen the gentleman what his vibrations are like
No
Just go ahead raise your hands yes
Your quite aware of one thing
That we are realized soul
And then you can raise the kundalini
Yesterday I saw so many Sahajyogis walked in.
And said, now come along give them realization
just stood there did like this
and that finished
You do not even think you have done such a great living work
That to erase their Kundalini
Not only but it will transform then
It would be given new life
There is some special people
As you are
We're not aware of your special people
Ego has vanished
So now you don't think that you are doing anything,
You thing it's Mother is doing everything.
Even then they give big-big speeches
They say,"Mother I never used to speak."
-"I didn´t know what was speech
and Now i have become a great speaker
It''s YOU who is doing this
This feeling comes because there
Is no ego anymore left
.Now if u see in the water
If U put drop
It becomes an ocean ,no doubt
but is not aware of it that has become an ocean,
It moves with the ocean.
But supposing you see a fish?
A Fish Is free!
If she wants She can move this way
,She Can Move That Way
.She Can Jump Up
..She Can Drink The Water
...she Can Do What She Likes
....but drop cannot
Drop Has to be part and parcel Of whole
So that was the intermediary stage
when You were animals
Animals were under pash, under the bandhan of God.
So they where doing exactly what was to be done
then you became human beings
Where your had complete freedom
To use it as You liked
If wanted go to heaven
Go to heaven
if want going hell
can go to Hell
It's all open to You
But now after becoming realized source
Your have become absolutely free people
But in that freedom you feel Me being there.
Now what is this?
Am I trying to tie You up with something
or am i giving some chains
Or am,am I guiding you
oor may all the time sort of a person
With gun behind do
Do these otherwise it will happen
That's not so
So What Is This new thing
That happening to Sahaja Yogis
is to be understood fully.
The new thing it's like this,
Like a fish goes everywhere does everything
but has no discretion
doesn't know which way go
what do sometimes get caught up
into the net of fisherman
It can eaten by another bigfish
Can destroyed anytime
May just crawl onto shore and gets finished
So the fish has no discretion, but it has some innate knowledge to save itself from dangers.
Now you don't have any innate knowledges about how to save yourself
from dangers and troubles – no innate knowledge like that
that you are cautious,
You shouldn't walk this way.
We should go like these
we shouldn' give you abrasions to somebody
and not treat someone.
No! That's no there
Innately
don´t have the knowledge
of trying save ourselves
or going from right side
but not left
it would be auspicious
Not so much
Still will always do right things
Whichever time
choose is the right auspicious time
You don't have to consult books for that.
Like once it happened in Lonavala, we had a puja
and It was
To be at ten o'clock as I twas here
–I wouldn''t go from my bath
For quite some time
And they were quiet upset
Mother what's the matter?
As i said its all right let us
Go ahead and you see
Was talking here there
Then went formy bath
At about eleven o clock
When come back
It was twelve o'clock, then sun had gone to the other side.
So they said...
They were little upset I said now bring the panchang
–the one where all these timings are written about the moon–
so till eleven o'clocks there amavasya
Amavasya is a day when
There's no Moon in sky
and you cannot have puja otherwise
So I had to wait.
They were amazed, they said we had consulted the panchang and I said which one?
And you see –they saw…
…They where surprised that how is it
That Mother could tell about amavasya
Because
The discretion
The knowledge of discretion
Is built within
so whatever You do
Whatever way You work It out
is built in within you.
You know how to do it, for example
For a human being if you prick him with the pin
immediately his hand will be lifted
Who has told Him that?
who had taught them this? No!
In His consciousness It's built
That once your pricked
Immediately Your Hand would go up automatically
With a reflex action
So The Reflex Action To Auspiciousness
Reflex action to your savings.
Reflex action, everything is built in within you
and once become a Sahaja Yogi immediately
You will start giving yourself a bandhan
We'll give others a bandhan
Don't have think about it
Reflex Action
Whatever we do
Will be auspicious
What ever he does
Will beautiful
What ever ask
Will Beautiful
Like this place you got
And people are amazed
How do we get it?
But in the beginning you have to develop,
You've got to mature.
Unless and until your are matured
–you don't not that discretion
Like when were trying
To find a place at London
I went with some Sahaja Yogis
And found out about this place
All kinds of funny places they like
I said,
The vibration is so bad
These people aren' t feeling any vibrations or anything
They wouldn''t even get into the place
No no no
This isn´t good
They said, no this has character.
I say these characters all the time doesn't count with Me you see
so they says but Mother how are we going to get a good place
and i will saying that We'll Get It
And You know..I was travelling by a plane
The Plane I opened a magazine
There ,i found Fudy camp
When went back
This is Place for us let's go have look
there it Was
and we found such a beautiful place.
So, We should allow
see things to work out have patience
Things will workout automatically
because now the whole of cosmos is with us
The whole of the discretion of the cosmos
Is With Us
The vibrations that think are there
The Vibrations That Guide Are With Us
The Vibrations That Organize Are With Us
Let them organize us
We are playing into their hands by which we
not bound, but helped.
Like supposing you have a baby
and look after the baby
But if there is somebody
she says alright let me look after your baby
so it's all right
Then
You go
to sleep
There' s someone who say
Don't worry I'll make
nice bed for you
So he said Alright
They made a nice bed
Then you sleep there, there's somebody to cover you.
Nicely you are covered!
They say all right
You have now go for your bath
see if the bathroom is ready
come along and have a bath
then want some pujas?
All right
There' s nice place
Come on
Have this
Nice place
Want an ashram
All Right
Nice place
Available
So it isn't that
you're bound by them
This point I'm trying
But you've been invited
You are treated with great respect and regard
– everybody at your service.
Say, Mother you come in My hand I'll come into Your head
if we say Come In my heart
then I will come to Your Heart
If We say Come Into My hands
Then i'lI come into Your Hands
So the whole of the cosmos is
At your Service
As itf you're on stage now
doing a job for Me
Now think that
under bondage
Is wrong thing
There's no Bondage
On contrary
The people
who are ganas, who are angels
,who are deities
and anxious to do whatever is possible
please you or keep your happy.
If say now the Kundalini has to raise all right
they're on there to help
anything want can be done
but first of what need maturity
And for maturity one have understand
that their culture of spirit
as we human cultures
we have culture of the Spirit, which must be imbibed.
The Culture Of The Spirit is to be imbibed
if you go according To The Culture Of The Spirit
then You cannot Have problems
and foremost thing in The Culture Of Spirit
Is that you Must respect yourself
because your are a Yogi
second things is you must respect other Yogis
Because they're yogi's
like I've told before in Ganpati Puran
There was one tailor, Nama Deva who was a saint and he went to see another one
Who just a potter. And the poter was mixing the mud with water
With his feet He working there
When Namdeva went and saw him
He saw Him and what he says,
nirgunacha bhetti alo sagunashi.
Meaning I came to see here formless
the vibrations – the chaitanya
formless, nirguna
.I come too se a nirgun meet nirguna
but hear it is in sagund
you are one who's in form of that Chaitanya
What a praise! Just think
One Sahaja Yogi saying another
Oh God, I just came here to meet the Nirguna, the nirakara
and whom do i meet? Here is the Saguna.
Is there in The Form
In The Form ,in You
.I see nothing but Chaitanya
That's that's the respect of another yogi or understanding
Nama Deva was an ordinary tailor
and was not a Brahmin.
So he wasn't treated very well by other Brahmins
And, He had to go to Punjab
or it is said that he has been called to Punjab
when he went there where Guru Nanaka saw him
and Guru Nanak said
That great saint have come for us
so they kept Him with them
They said you better learn Punjabi
because here the people don' understand Marathi
So learn Punjabi, and make your poems in Punjabi language.
And he started making poems in Punjabi language
Now I've got Namadeva's gatha is so big as that his book
Half of it all Punjabi language
Then the poem she makes are beautiful
They're sung in the Guru Granth Sahib they have
In temple
You know these big temples
Of Gurdwaras
Of Sikhs
There the Nama Deva is occupying at least one-tenth of the Guru Granth Sahib and there's
also Jana Bhai, another maid servant who was working with this Namdev.
Her poems are all so there!
So how they were respected by each other?
And How They understood Each Other Was something great but now it just the other way round.
We, the people who are false or wrong type of
People. Who Are making money out
Of God for deceiving
People were bringing all wrath and also
All The negativity to this world
To destroy This world are respected by common
People but the sahaja yogis must respect another
Sahajyoga till he is a sahaja yogi as long
As long as he is a Sahaja Yogi, he must be respected and understood.
It's very important!
This the culture of The Spirit
in that we respect all those who are spiritually higher
like talking about God
We cannot say things which aren't proper
Like if you can not see
That god is mischievous
You cant' sing
We're saints
We have to be very respectful towards God.
Any place which is sort of representing
also must respect it, everything that
is godly has got to be respected because
this culture of the spirit respects
all that is godly
and all that is auspicious
All
beautiful
In the culture we do not see superficial things
In this culture, we do not yield to anything because it is expensive or it is with such
pomp and show of publicity.
What we see in these cultures are how far it's joy-giving – even a small betel nut!
If somebody gives me love I'll keep that with Me
And if you give me diamonds without love
I have no value for them.
They will be lost or they'll finished, good-for nothing!
So the love that you put into everything
makes You a Sahaja Yogi
how do talk to each other
How Do deal with Each Other
How Do look after With Each Other
How Do Communicate Your Love in A Pure Manner
Say, a Sahajyogi should think
Oh !I must take this present for others Sahajyogis
I'm going there, then that – I'll meet that Sahaja Yogi.
He will be here and he would be there
just like your brothers see?
After such a long time
we're meeting him
it's really nice thing to meet him
talk with them
enjoy
sometimes also pull his legs
have fun at
but
the whole culture is of love
if you do not have
that sense of love, if you are a dry person or a morose
people and unhappy persons then remember
You're not a Sahaja Yogi. A sahaj yogi has to be
smiling enjoying personality
making others happy
That's the main attitude
Main concern should be
Next time I'll speaking about this spiritual culture
in Diwali
when you will be there, but this is the beginning
I have started talking about
new culture that we've to accept.
In expressing our love
We should not be ashamed
You shouldn't feel shy
About it at all
We are expressing
Our Love and Love must be expressed
There's no harm in expressing
But It happens
That if the beginning
If a little shy
We're conditioned how
To express
People will misunderstand
And they'll think
that we are wrong type of people. No,
We have to make the whole world
they're not going tp make us
.We haveto create a new worl and
They haveto follow us
,we arenot gongtopfollow them
And we arethe makersof kings
ane wearethemakerssof queens
anewerethemakersof everything
So weehaveto work it out that way
We don'thaveto bow to their ways
But we have to patronize and look after them when they come
first try treat as if a father would treat his son
And then bring him up, molded
give love
make understand that
We are people of very different domain
Different style
Absolutely free people
and being entertained by the Divine
are being looked after by the Divine,
or been helped and decorated
By The Divine.
Such a privileged place we have
so let us be of that dignity
And Of That Morality
That We Stand Up To That
How can do something wrong
to insult our Self?
Cannot!
We Are Yogijans
& We Have To Be Like Yogis
May God Bless You All
